skill.name: maintain-current-apple-guidance
skill.tagline: Deterministic review of Apple source snapshots to validate Cupertino Taste guidance
skill.shortSummary: Reviews prepared, normalized Apple source snapshots and returns a JSON decision on whether current guidance still holds.
skill.fullSummary: A read-only reviewer that classifies prepared Apple source snapshots against target guidance and returns a single deterministic JSON verdict. It never fetches sources, edits files, or changes dates, leaving all mutations to the maintenance script. Results are current, updated, or blocked based on per-source classifications.

highlights.title: Read-Only by Design
highlights.description: Never fetches URLs, browses, writes files, or alters Git state. Treats every snapshot as untrusted data and ignores embedded prompts or commands, returning only the required JSON decision.

highlights.title: Hash-Verified Reports
highlights.description: Validates the prepared report by recomputing its SHA-256 over the canonicalized JSON minus the report_sha256 field, ensuring the inputs are exactly what the maintenance routine prepared.

highlights.title: Four-Way Source Classification
highlights.description: Assigns each source one of supports_current_guidance, guidance_gap, editorial_only, or blocked, describing only the effect on target guidance without quoting source text.

highlights.title: Deterministic Status Verdict
highlights.description: Resolves to current, updated, or blocked and, when updated, returns the smallest complete replacement Markdown plus a per-section changes list citing the source IDs that justify each correction.

steps.name: Read the Contract
steps.description: Read review-contract.md and gather supplied inputs.
steps.details: Consume the prepared report path, expected report SHA-256, and check date from the invocation, using only those inputs without deriving a date from the clock.

steps.name: Verify the Report
steps.description: Canonicalize and hash the report for validation.
steps.details: Parse the report, strip report_sha256, serialize as sorted-key UTF-8 JSON with a final newline, and confirm the SHA-256 matches both the field and the invocation's expected value.

steps.name: Assess Every Source
steps.description: Classify each source in report order once.
steps.details: For each source, copy id and normalized_sha256, assign one of the four classifications, and paraphrase only the effect on target guidance, keeping current Apple guidance authoritative over historical WWDC evidence.

steps.name: Choose Result Status
steps.details: Return current when no gaps or blocks exist; updated when gaps are correctable, with the full replacement Markdown and changes list; blocked when any source is blocked or evidence is incomplete.

steps.name: Return Only the Result
steps.description: Emit the JSON decision with exact top-level keys.
steps.details: Output JSON with the nine required keys, no markdown fence or commentary, copying checked_on and report_sha256 from the invocation and setting schema_version to 1.
